steps.data:
<?php
// Demo only: the plugin lets admins skip the gate, and Playground auto-logs-in as
// admin — so force the gate on for everyone here via the kipphard_kipphard_age_verification_bypass_admin filter.
add_filter( 'kipphard_kipphard_age_verification_bypass_admin', '__return_false' );
add_filter( 'kipphard_age_verification_bypass_admin', '__return_false' );

steps.code:
<?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php';
$s = get_option('kipphard_age_verification_settings', array());
$s['kip_style_enabled'] = true;
$s['kip_preset'] = 'soft';
$s['kip_accent'] = '#f0834e';
$s['mode'] = 'confirm';
$s['scope'] = 'site';
$s['heading'] = 'Are you at least 18 years old?';
$s['message'] = 'This website contains content intended only for adults. Please confirm your age to continue.';
$s['confirm_label'] = 'Yes, I am over 18';
$s['decline_label'] = 'No';
$s['decline_message'] = 'You must be at least 18 years old to visit this site.';
$s['accent_color'] = '#f0834e';
$s['overlay_color'] = '#0d0d0f';
update_option('kipphard_age_verification_settings', $s);
update_option('kip_demo_panel_config', array('option' => 'kipphard_age_verification_settings', 'toggles' => array(array('label' => 'Age check', 'key' => 'mode', 'options' => array(array('val' => 'confirm', 'label' => 'Confirm'), array('val' => 'dob', 'label' => 'Date of birth'))))));
